extraction.one_line_summary: KRON Andreas attacked on the final climb, held off a disintegrated peloton after crashing late, won with 16 bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: GC teams neutralized from 9km instead of 3km, creating opportunity for non-favorites to attack final climb profitably
KRON Andreas attacked knowing GC contenders wouldn't chase due to early time cut, exploiting tactical vacuum
Breakaway managed time gap near 2 minutes on cat-2 climb, pelaton conserving energy before decisive finale
ROMO and SAVERINO sprinted for KOM points on cat-2, aggressive early racing for jersey positioning

rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: won after late crash, showed resilience and tactical awareness to attack when GC field neutralized
rider_signals.BARTA Roman: positive: took race lead through consistency, team defending lead successfully
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: neutral: second place finish suggests good positioning despite sprint not materializing fully
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: sat up with GC group at 9km, conservative racing pre-mountain stages
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: vocal displeasure with TTT conditions, needed jacket mid-race suggesting discomfort or tactical concern
